creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Looking ahead: I imagine that it will be not simple for the port to support about:processes

For now, can we suppress about:processes? 

Also, cease mapping Shift-Escape to the non-functional manager.

From <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1628531#c9> (2023-05-31): 

> With <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1777563> fixed, I think 
> we can now close this bug, even if some dependencies are still open.
